title: PierceArrow
description: This mod is make allow stuck arrow for another mob!
body:
# Pierce Arrow

![Piecing Arrow](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/380/751/2021-07-17_19.png)

## 🏹Summary

have you think why player body stuck arrow and not affect mob?  
This mod is make allow stuck arrow for another mob! even Warden!
not only pain for player!

also bee stinger is supported!
